Exp 5: 5-Predictor Positional RSA Summary — LLaMA-3-8B Base

5-predictor regression (C1-C4 only) at verb, object, and period token positions.

Positions: verb, object, period | 33 layers | 10K permutations | FDR q=0.05

Contents

  • 1. All-Predictor Summary Table
  • 2. Emergence Narrative
  • 3. Significance Heatmap
  • 4. Model A Detail (β, ΔR², semi-partial r)
  • 5. All Predictors by Position
  • 6. Full Layer-by-Layer Tables
Markers: * pFDR < .05, ** pFDR < .01, *** pFDR < .001. Filled dots on plots = FDR-significant. "# Sig" = number of FDR-significant layers. "1st Sig L" = first layer reaching FDR significance.
Key question: Does attribution binding (Model A) emerge left-to-right as the sentence is processed? At the verb, the object has not yet been seen — only subject+verb information is available. At the object, verb-object binding can begin. At the period, the full sentence has been processed. We predict: A absent/weak at verb, emerging at object, strongest at period.

1. All-Predictor Summary

Peak statistics and significance counts for all 5 predictors at each position.

2. Emergence Narrative

  • Model A (Full Attribution): First significant at verb L1, object L8, period L1. Total sig layers: verb: 16L, object: 23L, period: 22L.
  • Model B (Mental Verb + Object): First significant at verb L0, object L1, period L1. Total sig layers: verb: 31L, object: 32L, period: 21L.
  • Model C (Mental Verb Presence): First significant at verb L0, object L1, period L1. Total sig layers: verb: 28L, object: 32L, period: 19L.
  • Model D (Verb + Object): First significant at verb L0, object L1, period L2. Total sig layers: verb: 25L, object: 24L, period: 26L.
  • Model E (Subject + Verb + Object): First significant at verb L0, object L2, period L1. Total sig layers: verb: 33L, object: 31L, period: 32L.

3. Significance Heatmap

Each cell shows whether a predictor is FDR-significant at that layer, colored by position. Blended colors indicate significance at multiple positions.

4. Model A Detail

Three metrics for Model A (Full Attribution): standardized β, unique variance ΔR², and semi-partial r. Filled dots = FDR-significant.

5. All Predictors by Position

Each panel shows one predictor (A-E) with beta trajectories at each token position.

6. Full Layer-by-Layer Results

Complete results for each position. Bold red = FDR-significant.
